name: The Blue Phone — A Reality Altering Device
description:
Oh? What’s this? A phone that can alter reality? And it’s all yours? What could possibly go wrong?

One morning, you wake up to find your phone missing—replaced by an unfamiliar blue smartphone. At first glance, it seems just like your old device. Almost. But this phone is different. Sentient. Mysterious. And most importantly… it holds the power to reshape reality itself.

With limitless possibilities at your fingertips, one question remains: How will you use it?

If you couldn’t tell this is HEAVILY inspired by the Blue Phone comic series made by AlexGTS which was itself inspired by the BlueBerry Addventure by Jack Vigilante.

It’s also good to mention that I also took inspiration from the Magic Marker ai chatbot (the main inspiration was from AlexGTS of course).

As always, have fun! 👍
creator: Rigor_Mortis
